name: python3-zopfli
title: python3-zopfli
description:
cPython bindings for zopfli (Python 3)
pyzopfli is a straight forward wrapper around zopfli's ZlibCompress method.
pyzopfli also wraps GzipCompress, but the API point does not try to mimic
the gzip module.
use_cases: When you need Kali Linux, use python3-zopfli because cPython bindings for zopfli (Python 3).
When the engagement is in the install phase, use python3-zopfli as a cataloged Kali Linux tool with operator ACCEPT/CANCEL gating.
When chaining Kali Linux tools, pair python3-zopfli with sibling catalog entries sharing its attack_surface/phase_hint.
When validating lab setup, run `python3-zopfli --help` (or the README entrypoint) and confirm required hardware/deps from the catalog.
